layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: TableReasoner: Advancing Table Reasoning Framework with Large

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Language Models

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Sishi Xiong, Dakai Wang, Yu Zhao, Jie Zhang,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Changzai Pan, Haowei He, Xiangyu Li, Wenhan Chang,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Zhongjiang He, Shuangyong Song*, Yongxiang Li*

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Institute of Artificial Intelligence (TeleAI), China Telecom Corp Ltd

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Correspondence: {xiongsishi, songshy, liyx25} @chinatelecom.cn

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Abstract

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The paper presents our system developed for

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: table question answering (TQA). TQA tasks

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: face challenges due to the characteristics of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: real-world tabular data, such as large size, in-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: complete column semantics, and entity am-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: biguity. To address these issues, we pro-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: pose a large language model (LLM)-powered

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and programming-based table reasoning frame-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: work, named TableReasoner. It models a ta-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ble using the schema that combines structural

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and semantic representations, enabling holis-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tic understanding and efficient processing of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: large tables. We design a multi-step schema

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: linking plan to derive a focused table schema

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: that retains only query-relevant information,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: eliminating ambiguity and alleviating halluci-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: nations. This focused table schema provides

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: precise and sufficient table details for query re-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: finement and programming. Furthermore, we

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: integrate the reasoning workflow into an itera-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tive thinking architecture, allowing incremen-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tal cycles of thinking, reasoning and reflection.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Our system achieves first place in both subtasks

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of SemEval-2025 Task 8 1.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 1 Introduction

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Table Question Answering is a spin-off Question

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Answering (QA) task, aiming at responding to nat-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ural language questions based on table data that fea-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ture heterogeneous and complex two-dimensional

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: structure (Lu et al., 2025). Compared to tasks

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: involving unstructured or plain text, TQA faces

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: greater challenges and emphasizes the model's rea-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: soning abilities. The primary challenges encom-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: pass large size, incomplete semantics, and entity

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ambiguity. To advance research on table under-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: standing by applying language models, SemEval-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 2025 introduces Task 8: Question Answering on

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Tabular Data (Osés-Grijalba et al., 2025).

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: In this paper, we present TableReasoner, a sys-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tematic LLM-powered and programming-based

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: framework for TQA. We introduce the table

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: schema as the table representation, instead of entire

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: or truncated table text in conventional format (such

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: as CSV or Markdown), enabling our framework

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: capable of processing large tables. TableReasoner

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: employs a programming module to solve questions

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: using the table schema to understand the table con-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tent from a holistic perspective. To ensure precise

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: scheduling for query decomposition and program-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ming, we design a "parsing-linking-refinement" ac-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tion flow. It refines the global table schema into a

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: focused one only associated with the original query,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to some extent alleviating model hallucinations. In

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: addition, inspired by the ReAct (Yao et al., 2023)

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: paradigm, we incorporate the reasoning workflow

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: into a "thought-action-observation" architecture, fa-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: cilitating iterative cycles of thinking, reasoning and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: reflection within our system.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: TableReasoner is flexible to any advanced lan-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: guage model. It delivers excellent results even

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: without fine-tuning, while further performance en-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: hancements can be achieved through fine-tuning

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and majority voting. Our system wins first place

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: on both subtasks, validating the superiority and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: scalability of our framework.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 2 Background

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 2.1 DataBench Dataset

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: DataBench (Osés Grijalba et al., 2024) is an En-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: glish benchmark comprising 80 real-world tables,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: with splits of 49/16/15 for training, development,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and testing for TQA task. It contains five types

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of question-answer pair: boolean, category, num-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ber, list[category], and list[number]. The test set

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: contains 522 human-annotated question-answer

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: pairs. We categorize the tables of test set into large,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: medium, and small sets based on the number of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: cells. The distribution of QA types and the divi-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ¹Codes: https://github.com/ccx06/TableReasoner.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: * Corresponding authors.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: sion of size are detailed in Appendix A. DataBench

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: offers a reduced version called DataBench Lite,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: where each table retains the first 20 rows of data.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Correspondingly, the competition includes two sub-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tasks: subtask A on DataBench and subtask B on

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: DataBench Lite.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 2.2 Related works

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: TableLlama (Zhang et al., 2024a), TableGPT (Zha

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: et al., 2023), and StructLM (Zhuang et al., 2024)

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: continue to pre-train models with the decoder-only

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: architecture like Llama(Touvron et al., 2023) to-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: wards various table-related tasks. However, ta-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ble tuning demands a substantial amount of high-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: quality labeled data, which may be difficult to ob-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tain in certain domains.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: With the progress of LLMs, the paradigm has

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: increasingly shifted from traditional models pre-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: trained from scratch or task-specific modules de-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: signed for narrow applications (Liu et al., 2023;

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Xiong et al., 2024) to leveraging LLMs’ strong

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: reasoning and emergent abilities for adapting to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: downstream tasks (Ruan et al., 2024; Wu et al.; Li

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: et al., 2024b; Shao and Li, 2025). LEVER (Ni et al.,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 2023), Binder (Cheng et al., 2023), PoTable (Mao

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: et al., 2024) and OpenTab (Kong et al., 2024) are

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: programming-based methods, solving questions

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: with the assistance of SQL or Python codes. How-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ever, these methods exhibit limitations in fully com-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: prehending the relationships between questions and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: table data. Dater (Ye et al., 2023), Chain-of-Table

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: (Wang et al., 2024) and ReActTable (Zhang et al.,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 2024b) prompt LLMs iteratively to locate critical

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: rows and columns. These methods feed the entire

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: table text into the model, which are usually not

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: applicable for larger tables due to inherent context

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: length constraint. TableRAG (Chen et al., 2024) in-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: troduces a million-token table understanding frame-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: work, while the encoding and matching operations

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: result in accuracy loss and additional budget.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 3 System Overview

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Our system is implemented using TableReasoner,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: an LLM-powered and programming-based frame-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: work, as shown in Figure 1. It's designed to inte-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: grate a reasoning workflow into an iterative think-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ing process.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 3.1 Reasoning Workflow

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Table Schema Generation. We utilize the table

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: schema to describe and provide table information

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to LLMs. Firstly, we use Python to read the spread-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: sheet file. Each column is considered as a distinct

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: feature, characterized by data type and meta statisti-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: cal attributes (e.g., the maximum, minimum, mean

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and median values of numerical data; unique cate-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: gories and the most frequently occurring items of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: categorical data). Additionally, K random rows are

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: selected as example values. Then, to disambiguate

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: specific column names (such as abbreviations), we

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: incorporate the latent semantics of column names

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: into the table schema. In detail, we treat the above

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: table metadata as a preliminary schema to prompt

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the LLM to generate descriptions of the table and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: each column. The global table schema is structured

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: as JSON format, an illustrative example is provided

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: in Appendix B.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: This table representation method expands the ca-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: pacity of TableReasoner in processing large-sized

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tables. The token complexity of a table schema is

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: approximately O(N) , which is significantly lower

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: than the complexity O(M × N) of the entire table

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: when M is very large, where M and N denote the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: number of rows and columns respectively.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Table Schema Linking. We propose a "parsing-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: linking-refinement" action flow to refine the global

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: table schema into a focused schema strongly asso-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ciated with the query. (i) Parsing. We prompt LLM

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to parse the query based on the table schema, de-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: coupling it into specific sequential sub-queries. (ii)

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Linking. During parsing, the LLM is also prompted

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to extract relevant columns for each sub-query, a

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: process referred to as column linking. To align the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: entities mentioned in the query with the values in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the table, an entity linking step is employed. Specif-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ically, the LLM is used to identify whether the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: query contains entities, extract them, and suggest

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: belonging table columns. Next, Python is utilized

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to read all elements of the corresponding columns,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and the Longest Common Subsequence algorithm

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: is applied to retrieve elements from column entries

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: whose overlap rate with the query entity exceeds

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 0.6. Finally, we use the LLM to precisely select the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: aligned value from these recalled elements. For in-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: stance, "Mr Harari" in the query is linked to "Yuval

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Noah Harari" in the table. (iii) Refinement. At last,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: we prune irrelevant columns from the global table

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: schema and integrate entity alignment information

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: as needed, yielding a focused table schema. This

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: module effectively reduces token consumption and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: noise input.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Query Refinement. To enhance comprehension

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of complex reasoning tasks, we further decompose

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Figure 1: Architecture of TableReasoner framework. The table is firstly converted into a table schema containing

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: global features and example values. The table schema and query go through a reasoning workflow which comprising

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 5 core sequential modules to obtain observations. The reasoning process and observations are then fed into an

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: iterative thinking framework. It's repeated until expectations are met.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the query into S progressive sub-queries along with

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: associated column names using Chain-of-Thought

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: (CoT) prompting (Wei et al., 2022). The sole dis-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tinction from query parsing in table schema linking

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: stage lies in employing the focused table schema

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: which is more information-dense and de-noised.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Program-assisted Solution Generation. The

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: TableReasoner framework centers on programming

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to derive precise results. Specifically, we guide

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the LLM to generate a Program-of-Thoughts (PoT)

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: (Chen et al., 2023) solution, utilizing the focused

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: table schema and refined queries from prior steps.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The generated codes are subsequently executed in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: isolated environments (e.g., Python interpreter) to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: produce verifiable results. Compared to only tex-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tual reasoning approach, the program-assisted so-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: lution can effectively mitigate numerical hallucina-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tions in multi-step data acquisition and processing.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Answer Summary. Due to the strict answer for-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: mat requirements of DataBench, we introduce an

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: answer summary module at the end of the workflow.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: This module generates the final formatted answer

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: by summarizing intermediate thoughts and obser-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: vations derived from Python executions during the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: iterative reasoning process.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 3.2 Iterative Thinking Paradigm

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Inspired by the ReAct, we design the iterative

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: thinking paradigm, integrating the reasoning work-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: flow into a "thought-action-observation" architec-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ture, with the goal of bringing incremental self-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: reflection and decision-making mechanisms into

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the framework. "Thought" corresponds to the de-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: composed sub-queries from the Query Refinement

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: stage; "action" represents the program ideas and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: codes generated during the Program-assisted So-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: lution Generation stage; and "observation" is the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: feedback from code execution. This creates a rea-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: soning cycle in our workflow. Upon completion of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: each cycle, the system evaluates whether the query

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: can be answered with the current reasoning state.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: If yes, it proceeds to the Answer Summary stage;

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: otherwise, it generates a new follow-up query and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: repeats the process.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 3.3 Supervised Fine-tuning

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: For the purpose of boosting the QA ability on

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: DataBench dataset, we fine-tune the LLMs de-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ployed in Query Refinement and Program-assisted

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Solution Generation stages. We adopt rejection

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: sampling (Yuan et al., 2023) method on DataBench

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: train and development datasets to synthetize train-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ing data. Please refer to Appendix C for details.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 4 Experimental setup

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Model². We conduct extensive experiments

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: on popular LLMs, including the open-sourced

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Qwen2.5 series (Yang et al., 2024; Hui et al., 2024),

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Llama3 series (Dubey et al., 2024), TeleChat2-35B

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: (He et al., 2024; Li et al., 2024a), Mistral-Large³

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and close-sourced GPT-4o (OpenAI, 2023). GPT-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 4o is invoked via the official API interface, and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: other models are deployed and invoked locally.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Implementation. We fine-tune the Qwen2.5-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 32B-Instruct and Mistral-Large models for the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Query Refinement and Program-assisted Solution

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Generation stages respectively, applying Low-Rank

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Adaptation method (Hu et al., 2022). Each model

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: is trained for 5 epochs, with learning rate of 5e-6,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: lora rank of 8 and total batch size of 32. We set the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: temperature to 0 to ensure stable output during in-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ference. If majority-voting strategy is adopted, the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: temperature is configured according to the default

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: values. Within the iterative thinking framework,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the maximum round of reasoning cycle is set to 5.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: We design delicate prompts combining few-shot

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: learning, structured output and CoT strategies to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: mitigate model bias and address intricate details.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Some prompts can be found in Appendix E.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Baseline. We compare 2 common prompting ap-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: proaches with our TableReasoner. (i) Zero-shot

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: In-Context Learning (Z-ICL), which provides the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: task description and table data in the prompt for

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: textual reasoning. (ii) Code-based, which directly

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: answers queries by generating PoT solution lever-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: aging a single LLM and executing codes. For the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: sake of fairness, we format program execution re-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: sults through the Answer Summary module to pro-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: duce final answers. In these cases, we represent

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tables in Markdown format, which is one of the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: most common verbalized types of tabular data.

layout_dets.text: 5 Results and Analysis

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 5.1 Main Results

layout_dets.label: ocr_text

layout_dets.label: ocr_text

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: show superior performance. A consistent trend

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of performance enhancement is observed as the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: model parameters increased in Qwen model series.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The results of the Z-ICL method are provided in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Appendix D.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: derstanding of user intent and possess a deep com-

layout_dets.text: prehension of tabular data, including deduplica-

layout_dets.text: tion and multi-column correlation analysis. The

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: proposed TableReasoner exhibits more balanced

layout_dets.label: ocr_text

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Analysis on table size. We explore the perfor-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: mance on small, medium and large size of tables.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: not only validates the efficacy of the PoT method

layout_dets.label: ocr_text

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: large-scale tabular data. Remarkably, TableRea-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: soner exhibits outstanding scalability and robust-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ness, showing minimal degradation as the table size

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: expands.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 5.2 Ablation Study

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: We perform ablation study to verify the effective-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ness of each component of TableReasoner work-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: flow. The experiments are conducted on the frame-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: work that embeds Qwen2.5-32B model, and results

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: are shown in Table 2. The accuracy shows a drastic

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: deterioration when removing table schema gener-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ation and schema linking modules and replacing

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: table schema with the markdown-format text in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: other remaining stages. The accuracy decreases

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: by 5.37% on the test set and 1.92% on the Lite

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: test set, strongly demonstrating the superiority of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: applying table schema as the representation, espe-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: cially for large-sized tables. It is suggested that

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the specific data in each row is of lesser impor-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tance compared to comprehending table's overall

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: structure and column features for programming-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: based solutions. Removing the schema linking or

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: query refinement module leads to a drop in accu-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: racy, highlighting the importance of the focused

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: table schema and refined sub-queries.

layout_dets.text: 5.3 Effects of Strategies

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: LLM Combination. We observe Mistral performs

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: better in code generation tasks. Building upon

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: this finding, we design a hybrid architecture: em-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ploying Mistral-Large in Program-assisted Solution

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Generation stage, while retaining Qwen2.5-32B for

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: other functional modules. The experimental results

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: shown in Table 1 indicate that this hybrid archi-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tecture slightly improves accuracy by 0.76% on

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: DataBench test set compared to the architecture

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: using solely Qwen2.5-32B.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Fine-tuning & Majority-voting. To further im-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: prove the accuracy on DataBench, we employ the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: fine-tuned LLMs described in Section 4 within the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: hybrid architecture. As demonstrated in Table 3,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: coupled with majority voting based on the self-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: consistency principle, our system achieves state-of-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the-art accuracy of 93.87% and 91.76% on test and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Lite test sets, respectively.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 6 Conclusion

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: In this paper, we introduce an LLM-powered and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: programming-based table easoning framework —

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: TableReasoner, which achieves first place in both

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: subtasks of SemEval-2025 Task 8. We utilize the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: table schema as a representation, understanding the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: table from a holistic perspective and addressing

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the context length constraint. A comprehensive

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: schema linking is implemented in TableReasoner,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: which provides a focused and precise table schema

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: for query refinement and programming. Besides,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: we propose an iterative thinking paradigm, incor-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: porating the reasoning workflow to facilitate incre-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: mental thinking and reflection. We further enhance

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: performance through fine-tuning and majority vot-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ing. Extensive experiments indicate our system

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: is of high scalability and performance across real-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: world table datasets and has a greater advantage on

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: large-sized tables.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Limitations

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: For Z-ICL and Code-based methods using LLMs

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: without fine-tuning, prompt design plays a criti-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: cal role in influencing model performance. For

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: instance, representing tabular data in different for-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: mats, such as JSON, CSV or Markdown, can lead

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to varying results, as different LLMs may exhibit

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: format preferences. Due to time constraints, we

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: were unable to comprehensively evaluate the ef-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: fects of prompt variations on the comparative ex-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: perimental outcomes. We will further investigate

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the impact of different prompt designs.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: In this study, we focus on the domain of rea-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: soning over tabular data. Our proposed TableRea-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: soner framework achieves high accuracy by en-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: couraging deliberate reasoning steps. However, it

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: requires numerous inference iterations which are

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: time-consuming. In future work, We will explore

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: adaptive action flow to balance inference times with

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: accuracy.

layout_dets.text: C Preparation of Fine-tuning Dataset

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The preparation of our fine-tuning dataset involves

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the following steps: (1) Reasoning Path Col-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: lection. Within our pipeline, we utilize multi-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ple advanced LLMs—such as GPT-4o, Qwen2.5-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 72B-Instruct, and Mistral-Large—to perform five

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: rounds of inference on both the training and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: development sets of DataBench (excluding the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: DataBench Lite subset), with the temperature pa-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: rameter set to its default value (not 0). The inputs

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and outputs of the Query Refinement and Program-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: assisted Solution Generation modules are recorded

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: for each inference round. Consequently, for each

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: question q, we obtain two sets of reasoning paths:

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: , where

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: denote the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: input and output of Query Refinement step,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: denote the input and output of Program-assisted

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Solution Generation step. (2) Filtering Incorrect

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Reasoning Paths. We verify the correctness of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the final reasoning results against ground truth an-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: swers and discard any reasoning paths that lead

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to incorrect results.(3) Reasoning Path Selection.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: We employ a rule-based reward mechanism to se-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: lect the optimal reasoning paths. For the Query

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Refinement model, we prioritize paths

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: that

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: correctly associate column names with more sub-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: queries. For the Program-assisted Solution Gener-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ation model, we select paths

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: with greater

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: code length. If multiple candidates remain, one is

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: chosen randomly.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: For questions that have never been answered

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: correctly, we manually remove ambiguous ones

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and annotate the others with hints. Specifically, we

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: provide one to three key clues to guide the LLMs

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: toward correctly interpreting and answering the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: question. The question and its corresponding hints
